prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Two race track diagrams stacked vertically. Top track "Promise.all (parallel)": three parallel lanes with three runners starting at the same time from a single starting gun. They run simultaneously and all cross the finish line around the same time. A results board collects all three results. A stopwatch shows "1x time". Bottom track "Sequential (await each)": a single lane with three runners going one after another; runner 2 waits for runner 1 to finish before starting. A stopwatch shows "3x time". The parallel approach is clearly highlighted as faster with a gold star.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
